use_cases: Swipe-to-confirm destructive actions like account deletion or data removal
Mobile-first approval workflows requiring gesture-based confirmation
Two-step confirmation for financial transactions in banking apps
Secure action verification in healthcare data management systems
E-commerce order confirmations with gesture-based commitment
ai_summary: A reusable button component with Radix UI Slot for composition, featuring CVA-based variants for different visual states. Designed as the interactive element within a swipe-to-confirm pattern, supporting multiple visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built for mobile-first gesture interactions requiring physical drag confirmation, commonly used for secure or destructive action verification in SaaS, fintech, and healthcare applications.
